work.desc_title: Services for selected festivals of the ecclesiastical year

excerpt.as_written: ܥܠ ܚܝܠܐ ܕܡܪܢ ܝܫܘܥ ܡܫܝܚܐ ܟܬܒܝܢܢ ܠܡܪܝ ܡܘܫܐ ܕ ܒܐܝܠܘܠ
.ܐܘ ܪܝܫܟܗܢܐ ܟܝܪܝܠܠܘܣ. ܫܐܠ ܠܢ ܖ̈ܚܡܐ ܘܚܘܣܝ ܚܘܒܐ

contents.label: 4 Ēlūl (September), St Moses [the Prophet]
note: Canon to the Holy Trinity, mode 4 (ff. 15r–19v): Odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9
Another canon, “composition by the bishop Metrophanes”, mode 2 (ff. 19v–25r): Odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9

contents.label: Thursday of the fifth week of the Lent
note: Stichera of the Great Canon on Repentance, mode 6 (ff. 26v–29r)
Makarismoi of the Great Canon on Repentance “that we sing after ode 6”, mode 6 (ff. 29r–32r)

Canon, “composition by the venerable Andrew, the bishop of the island of Crete, translated from Greek into Syriac by John bar ‘Īsā, the priest in the city of Rome” (ff. 32v–82v): Ode 1 (ff. 32v–37r); Ode 2 (ff. 37r–40r); Ode 2, “another heirmos” (ff. 40r–42v); Ode 3 (ff. 42v–46r); Ode 3, “another heirmos” (ff. 46r–47r); Ode 4 (ff. 47r–54r); Ode 4, “from the triode by father Joseph, mode 8” (f. 54r–v); Ode 4, “by father Theodore” (ff. 54v–55r); Ode 5 (ff. 55r–59v); Ode 6 (ff. 59v–62v); Ode 7 (ff. 62v–67r); Ode 8 (ff. 67r–72v); Ode 8, “heirmos from the triode, mode 8” (ff. 72v–73r); [Ode 8, heirmos] (f. 73r–v); Ode 9 (ff. 73v–81r); [Ode 9], “from the triode, mode 8” (f. 81r–v); [Ode 9], heirmos (ff. 81v–82v)
“Stichera after Glory to God in the highest of the canon on repentance”, mode 4 (ff. 83r–91r)

contents.label: 2 Ēlūl (September), Holy Martyr Mamas of Caesarea
note: Troparion on God is the Lord, mode 4 (f. 91r)
Canon, “composition by father John”, mode 4 (ff. 93r–101v): Odes 1, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9
